_meta.description: CloudSaw finding-type catalog — Contract 16E. Maps rule_key to a localized display name and short description. AI-drafted, human-reviewed. Resource identifiers and AWS API semantics are NEVER translated — only the human-facing display name and one-line description.

s3-public-bucket.name: S3 bucket allows public access
s3-public-bucket.summary: An S3 bucket is open to anonymous reads or writes.

iam-user-no-mfa.name: IAM user without MFA
iam-user-no-mfa.summary: An IAM user is allowed to sign in without a second factor.

iam-root-access-keys.name: Root account access keys
iam-root-access-keys.summary: The root account has long-lived access keys — these should be deleted.

iam-password-policy-no-minimum-length.name: IAM password policy: missing minimum length
iam-password-policy-no-minimum-length.summary: The account's IAM password policy does not enforce a minimum length.

iam-password-policy-no-expiration.name: IAM password policy: passwords never expire
iam-password-policy-no-expiration.summary: Passwords are allowed to live indefinitely.

iam-password-policy-no-reuse-prevention.name: IAM password policy: reuse not prevented
iam-password-policy-no-reuse-prevention.summary: Users can rotate back to a previous password.

ec2-security-group-opens-ssh-to-all.name: EC2 security group exposes SSH (22) to the internet
ec2-security-group-opens-ssh-to-all.summary: 0.0.0.0/0 is allowed to reach port 22 on at least one security group.

ec2-security-group-opens-rdp-to-all.name: EC2 security group exposes RDP (3389) to the internet
ec2-security-group-opens-rdp-to-all.summary: 0.0.0.0/0 is allowed to reach port 3389 on at least one security group.

ec2-security-group-opens-all-ports-to-al.name: EC2 security group opens every port to the internet
ec2-security-group-opens-all-ports-to-al.summary: 0.0.0.0/0 with no port restriction is attached to at least one resource.

ec2-instance-with-public-ip.name: EC2 instance with a public IP
ec2-instance-with-public-ip.summary: An EC2 instance is reachable directly from the public internet.

cloudtrail-not-enabled-globally.name: CloudTrail not enabled in all regions
cloudtrail-not-enabled-globally.summary: At least one region has no CloudTrail trail covering it.

cloudtrail-no-log-file-validation.name: CloudTrail log file validation disabled
cloudtrail-no-log-file-validation.summary: Cumulative log integrity hashes are not enabled.

cloudtrail-no-logs-encryption.name: CloudTrail logs not KMS-encrypted
cloudtrail-no-logs-encryption.summary: CloudTrail log files are stored unencrypted at rest.

cloudfront-distribution-no-https.name: CloudFront distribution does not force HTTPS
cloudfront-distribution-no-https.summary: A distribution allows plaintext HTTP traffic to its origin.

cloudfront-distribution-no-logs.name: CloudFront distribution with no access logs
cloudfront-distribution-no-logs.summary: Access logging is disabled for at least one distribution.

elb-no-access-logs.name: Classic ELB without access logs
elb-no-access-logs.summary: Access logging is disabled for at least one Classic ELB.

elbv2-no-deletion-protection.name: ELBv2 deletion protection disabled
elbv2-no-deletion-protection.summary: A load balancer can be deleted without manual confirmation.
